title: Modern Font Pack - Caxton Edition
description: Provides better font smoothing than Modern Font Pack - Standard Edition
body:
**Before downloading, please read the description carefully!**  
**This is the Caxton Edition of Modern Font Pack. If you are looking for the source project for this project, go to [Modern Font Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-font-pack).** 

This is **Modern Font Pack - Caxton Edition**, which provides better font smoothing than **[Modern Font Pack - Standard Edition](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-font-pack)**. Fonts are taken from the [Noto Sans font family](https://fonts.google.com/noto/specimen/Noto%20Sans) commissioned by Google. It requires the [Caxton mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton) created by flirora to work.  
[![Caxton](https://i.ibb.co/CBsN3Nf/S-Zp-Mhgkt-L-x-w-Js-TMw-RLLtglxabxgf-LRm-DJZ99-Tmnw6-Nf-RZf2eo-wyifw-XJzy-Ha-Hwdzbt-Wl-ORDn-Fv69-Ey.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton)  

There are five major versions as follows:  
- **JP**: CJK font is **Noto Sans Japanese**.  
![Noto Sans CJK with JP variant](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/91775602/261809012-43a17d63-1acf-4ec1-8f56-661f87714265.png)
- **KR**: CJK font is **Noto Sans Korean**.  
![Noto Sans CJK with KR variant](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/91775602/261809022-158e7c08-4101-4656-a7e8-ae61a6443872.png)
- **CN**: CJK font is **Noto Sans Simplified Chinese**.  
![Noto Sans CJK with CN variant](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/91775602/261809036-3788d254-d1af-4a92-8cf8-559a5319cdcc.png)
- **TW**: CJK font is **Noto Sans Traditional Chinese**.  
![Noto Sans CJK with TW variant](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/91775602/261809041-192c9d4c-9a92-4baa-863f-2eba02939502.png)
- **HK**: CJK font is **Noto Sans Hong Kong**.  
![Noto Sans CJK with HK variant](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/91775602/261809048-1605e43f-eaf0-48bb-97da-872aff5dfbbc.png)

**Due to technical limitations, what you need to know is:**  
1. When loading a resource pack for the **first time**, it may take a few minutes because Caxton mod needs to cache the resource pack's font files.  
2. Some characters may not have *italic* variants, which causes those characters that appear in *italic text* to always be displayed in regular variants. This limitation exists in Caxton versions 0.5.5 and below, and 0.7.0 and above, but not in versions 0.5.6 to 0.6.0.  
3. Similar to the previous point, some characters do not have a **bold** variant, which causes those characters that appear in **bold text** to always be displayed in regular variants. This limitation exists in all versions of Caxton.  
4. In Caxton versions 0.4.12 and below, doing any of the following while this resource pack is loaded may **crash the JVM**, thus causing **all resource pack be deactivated**:  
  - Changing the mipmap level.  
  - Changing the language.  
  - Activating or deactivating resource packs, or changing the order in which resource packs are sorted.  
  - Reloading resource packs.  

The format of the resource pack file name is **`MFP-Caxton-[Version Category][Version Number][CJK Type].zip`**, where:

**1. `[Version Category]`:**  
  - **`08`** represents that the resource pack is suitable for **version 1.18.2**.  
  - **`09`** represents that the resource pack is suitable for **version 1.19.2**.  
  - **`10`** represents that the resource pack is suitable for **version 1.19.3**.  
  - **`11`** represents that the resource pack is suitable for **version 1.19.4**.  
  - **`12`** represents that the resource pack is suitable for **versions 1.20 and 1.20.1**.  
  - **`13`** represents that the resource pack is suitable for **versions 1.20.2 and above**.  

**2. `[Version Number]`**: Start from **`00`**. Every time it is updated, the number will increase by **`1`**.  

**3. `[CJK Type]`:**  
  - **`J`** represents that the Chinese characters are designed according to the Chinese character standard in **Japan**.  
  - **`K`** represents that the Chinese characters are designed according to the Chinese character standard in **Korea**.  
  - **`C`** represents that the Chinese characters are designed according to the Chinese character standard in **China**.  
  - **`T`** represents that the Chinese characters are designed according to the Chinese character standard in **Taiwan**.  
  - **`H`** represents that the Chinese characters are designed according to the Chinese character standard in **Hong Kong**.  


For example:  
1. If you want to use the resource pack that can be used in **version *1.18.2***, and the **Chinese characters are designed according to the Chinese character standard in *Taiwan***, the file to be downloaded is "MFP-Caxton-**08**02**T**.zip".  
2. If you want to use the resource pack that can be used in **version *1.19.2***, and the **Chinese characters are designed according to the Chinese character standard in *Hong Kong***, the file to be downloaded is "MFP-Caxton-**09**02**H**.zip".  
3. If you want to use the resource pack that can be used in **version *1.19.4***, and the **Chinese characters are designed according to the Chinese character standard in *China***, the file to be downloaded is "MFP-Caxton-**11**02**C**.zip".  
4. If you want to use the resource pack that can be used in **version *1.20.1***, and the **Chinese characters are designed according to the Chinese character standard in *Korea***, the file to be downloaded is "MFP-Caxton-**12**02**K**.zip".  
5. If you want to use the resource pack that can be used in **version *1.21.10***, and the **Chinese characters are designed according to the Chinese character standard in *Japan***, the file to be downloaded is "MFP-Caxton-**13**02**J**.zip".  

If your country or region **does not use Chinese characters**, **you do not need to pay attention to the *Chinese character standard* in the `[CJK Type]` field**. You just need to **pay attention to the `[Version Category]` field**.  

**Share This Resource Pack!**  
Welcome to share this resource pack to some Minecraft communities! As resource packs will be updated due to feature requests, bug fixes or game updates, it is recommended to use the links on this site so players can enjoy the latest version of the content. If you have to rehost these resource pack files because some people don't have access to the site or its download link, remember to check back from time to time to see if the resource pack has been updated. It is recommended to join my Discord server to ensure that you are notified when resource packs are updated.  

**Feedback**  
If you find a bug or want to make a feature request, please read the description first. To report a bug or make a feature request, it is recommended to go to [Issues](https://github.com/YutaYamamoto212/ModernFontPack-Caxton/issues/new/choose) to submit an issue. You are also welcome to join my Discord server.  

**Discord**  
Click [HERE](https://discord.gg/tqzdEaBAcn) to join my Discord server!  

**Installation**  
Before downloading, please note:  
- These resource packs require [Caxton mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton), which requires [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), or [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/), or [NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/), depending on which mod loader you want to use.
- If you are looking for ones that does not require any mods, click [HERE](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-font-pack).  

1. Download this Resource Pack in the Versions tab or Changelog tab.  
2. Select your game version in the Game versions field.  
3. After you find the resource pack you want to download, click the download button (A downward arrow if you are in the Versions tab. When the cursor hovers over it, it will turn into a downward arrow in a green circle and a Download tooltip will appear) on the left.  
4. Place it in "<game directory>/resourcepacks". For example, "%appdata%\\.minecraft\resourcepacks".  
5. Go to Options -> Resource Packs, and then apply it. If you receive an incompatibility warning, it means you may have downloaded the wrong version. Please return to this site, select the correct version and download it. If you are using this resource pack with resource packs that have modified fonts, resource packs that have added custom characters, or Patchouli Mod, please arrange on top of those resource packs or Fabric Mods or Mod Resources to ensure proper functioning. If you are not sure how to arrange it, please arrange it at the top.
